svg.title: Enterprise Knowledge Solution — System Architecture (Deployment Topology)
svg.desc: Traditional deployment-topology view: Knowledge clients connect through the Enterprise Knowledge Service (Agent runtime, Retrieval, MCP gateway, LLM gateway) which talks to external Model providers and Data sources, reads from a Knowledge fabric populated by an Ingestion pipeline, and is governed by Identity, Observability and Evaluation tiers.

g.text: Enterprise knowledge service · 企業知識服務
Knowledge fabric · 知識基礎設施
